findings.description: Section content is only 4 characters ("なし。"), well below the 50-character threshold. This accurately reflects the source ("拡張例" contains only "なし。"), so it is structurally unavoidable, but it should be noted.
The hint "カスタマイズ" has no basis in the source. The extension section in the source contains only "なし。" with no mention of customization.
